transfer_steps.role: extract the controlled energy bound from the closed restricted energy inequality
compare the restricted energy functional to the declared norm-control quantity
absorb all declared controlled terms into the norm-control estimate
produce a restricted continuation norm-control statement with no unclassified energy, boundary, or interior term

positive: Records the energy-to-norm control transfer lemma target after restricted energy inequality closure.
Separates closed energy control from coercive norm comparison and controlled-term absorption.
Makes explicit that the next blocker is assembling the restricted continuation norm-control closure statement.
negative: Does not prove the closed restricted energy inequality.
Does not prove the energy functional controls the declared norm.
Does not prove coercive norm comparison.
Does not prove the restricted continuation norm-control theorem.
Does not close the full RR restricted-continuation theorem.
